plot_style.city_colors: shared across maps, Monte Carlo, and missingness plots
plot_style.period_interval: period panels show median and 95th percentile only; IQR is intentionally omitted
plot_style.daily_nstar: right-axis N*(d) is a dashed dark-gray trace compressed into the upper band of each panel; right-axis tick labels give native valid-sensor counts

notes: Chicago period curve is a nine-month aggregate, not a 12-month annual mean.
Daily plots mark n=10 days at or above the city-specific 95th percentile of the plotted error metric; mechanism labels are pending event classification.
